data: {"generalSituation":"A broad trough of low pressure will linger over the vicinity of the coast of southern China to the northern part of the South China Sea tomorrow to midweek next week. There will be heavy showers and squally thunderstorms. High temperature weather will be alleviated. An easterly airstream is expected to affect the coast of eastern Guangdong in the middle to latter parts of next week. There will still be a few showers over the region. Besides, the tropical cyclone near Taiwan will move towards the seas south of Japan in the next couple of days.","weatherForecast":[{"forecastDate":"20260606","week":"Saturday","forecastWind":"South to southwest force 2 to 3.","forecastWeather":"Mainly cloudy with occasional showers and squally thunderstorms.
